articles.title: China’s Victory Giant Seeks Up to $2.2 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
articles.summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. began taking investor orders for a listing in Hong Kong that may raise as much as HK$17.5 billion ($2.2 billion) in what is set to be among the city’s largest first-time share sales this year.
articles.title_zh: 中國勝利巨人尋求在香港上市籌資最高22億美元
articles.summary_zh: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. 開始接受投資者認購訂單，計劃在香港上市，籌資最高可達175億港元（22億美元），將成為今年香港最大規模的首次公開發行之一。

articles.title: The Federal Government’s Case Against the NFL
articles.summary: The NFL is the most popular sport in the US. The government says it’s hurting fans.

articles.summary_zh: NFL 是美國最受歡迎的運動，但政府稱其正在傷害球迷。

articles.title: Gmail全程加密擴展到企業客戶的Android、iOS App
articles.summary: 在桌機版推出2年後，Google上週宣布將Gmail全程加密（end-to-end encryption，E2EE）由桌機版推向Android和iOS裝置。不過能享受者僅限訂閱付費版Workspace的企業用戶。

articles.title: Nothing Phone 4a Pro passes durability tests with flying colors, but there’s one issue
articles.summary: TL;DR Popular YouTube channel JerryRigEverything has conducted a durability test on the Nothing Phone 4a Pro. One of the phone’s waterproof barriers could apparently be pierced by inserting a SIM card removal tool into the microphone hole. The channel was otherwise impressed with the phone’s durability to scratches, bending, and burning. The Nothing Phone 4a Pro is a great alternative to the Pixel 10a and Samsung Galaxy A57, and one of the best cheap Android phones of 2026. But how durable is it, though? Well, a trusted outlet has just put this to the test. YouTube channel JerryRigEverything conducted a durability test on the Nothing Phone 4a Pro (see the video at the top of the page). Perhaps the most surprising finding concerns the phone’s IP65 rating. Host Zack Nelson found that acciden
articles.title_zh: Nothing Phone 4a Pro 通過耐久性測試，但存在一個問題
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 頻道 JerryRigEverything 對 Nothing Phone 4a Pro 進行了耐久性測試，發現通過 SIM 卡移除工具可能會刺穿麥克風孔附近的防水屏障。除此之外，該手機的耐用性表現令人印象深刻。

articles.title: Upcoming Android flagships may get a bold new look, and you can probably thank Apple
articles.summary: Credit: Robert Triggs / Android Authority TL;DR A new leak from Digital Chat Station suggests that upcoming Android flagships are preparing to copy Apple’s hero color from the iPhone 18 Pro. DCS claims that they’ve seen many next-gen Android flagships in a new deep red colorway, which is very likely a shade Apple will debut on the new iPhones. Apple could be gearing up to set the next big smartphone color trend, and if history is any indication, Android brands may end up following its lead once again.
articles.title_zh: 即將推出的 Android 旗艦機可能會採用大膽的新外觀，這要感謝 Apple
articles.summary_zh: Digital Chat Station 的爆料顯示，即將推出的 Android 旗艦機正在準備仿製 iPhone 18 Pro 的英雄色彩，許多下一代 Android 旗艦機採用深紅色配色。

articles.title: The foldable redesign we’ve been waiting to see from Samsung and Apple is already here
articles.summary: Credit: HUAWEI TL;DR HUAWEI has officially revealed the Pura X Max, a wide foldable phone that ditches the tall design seen on current devices. The Pura X Max is expected to feature a 7.69-inch inner display and a 5.5-inch outer screen, closely matching the dimensions of the so-called Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide. By launching first, HUAWEI has beaten Samsung and Apple to defining the next new foldable form factor. We’ve gotten very used to tall and narrow foldable phone designs over the past few years, but 2026 is shaping up to be the year that flips that script. With Apple and Samsung both expected to embrace wider foldable designs , the industry is clearly heading in a new direction. But before either one of them could make their move, another competitor has already shown its hand.
articles.title_zh: 我們期待已久的可摺疊手機重新設計已經來自 HUAWEI 和 Apple
articles.summary_zh: HUAWEI 正式推出了 Pura X Max，這是一款寬屏可摺疊手機，採用了不同於現有設備的設計。Pura X Max 預計搭載 7.69 英寸內屏和 5.5 英寸外屏。

articles.title: First look: The OPPO Find X9 Ultra brings back leather and goes big on camera design
articles.summary: TL;DR We got our first hands-on look at the OPPO Find X9 Ultra ahead of its official launch. The phone marks a clear design shift from both the Find X8 Ultra and the rest of the Find X9 family. Full specs remain under embargo, but the camera module tells its own story. The OPPO Find X9 Ultra is finally arriving, and it’s a complete departure from the sleek, minimalist glass we saw on the Find X8 Ultra. Instead of following the “smooth-and-simple” trend, the X9 Ultra leans into a bold, tactile look that feels like a return to the series’ roots. The biggest change is the return of vegan leather. After moving to matte glass with the X8, OPPO has brought back the two-panel aesthetic. The rear is split into a textured upper section for the massive camera housing and a matching lower section for
articles.title_zh: 首次上手：OPPO Find X9 Ultra 帶回皮革設計並大幅升級相機模組
articles.summary_zh: 我們搶先體驗了即將推出的 OPPO Find X9 Ultra，該手機在設計上相比 Find X8 Ultra 和 Find X9 系列其他產品都有明顯變化，相機模組設計尤其值得關注。

articles.title: Taiwan Leader to Visit Eswatini in First Foreign Trip Since 2024
articles.summary: Taiwan’s President Lai Ching-te plans to visit the island’s last remaining diplomatic ally in Africa, in his first trip abroad since December 2024.
articles.title_zh: 台灣領導人首次出訪2024年後訪問史瓦帝尼
articles.summary_zh: 台灣總統賴清德計劃訪問該島在非洲僅存的外交盟友，這是他自2024年12月以來首次出國。

articles.title: Why You Should Wait Out AI’s Super-Spending False Start
articles.summary: Merryn Somerset Webb sits down with Janusz Marecki, CEO and founder of Fractal Brain and AI partner at Ahren Innovation Capital, for an insider perspective on artificial intelligence hype versus reality and what may come next. The focus is on large language models (LLMs) and whether they are hitting their fundamental limits. Marecki discusses the data ceiling, diminishing returns from scaling compute and persistent issues like hallucinations and probabilistic errors. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 為什麼你應該靜觀其變 AI 的超額支出虛火
articles.summary_zh: Merryn Somerset Webb 與 Fractal Brain 執行長兼創辦人 Janusz Marecki 進行對談，從內部角度探討人工智能炒作與現實的落差，以及對大語言模型 (LLMs) 的未來前景的深入分析。

articles.title: Covid Virus May Spread More Widely by Turning Lung Cells Into Targets, Study Finds
articles.summary: The coronavirus that causes Covid-19 may spread through the lungs by turning previously resistant cells into targets for infection, a finding that helps explain the widespread inflammation and organ damage seen in severe cases and points to a potential new treatment.
articles.title_zh: 研究發現：Covid 病毒可能通過將肺細胞轉變為攻擊目標來更廣泛傳播
articles.summary_zh: 導致 Covid-19 的冠狀病毒可能通過將先前抵抗力強的細胞轉變為感染目標在肺部傳播，該發現有助於解釋重症患者出現的廣泛炎症和器官損傷，並指向一種潛在的新治療方法。

articles.title: Amazon調整Luna定位，從遊戲平臺轉向訂閱服務
articles.summary: Amazon近日宣布，旗下雲端遊戲服務Amazon Luna自2026年4月10日起，停止提供第三方遊戲商店、單獨購買遊戲（A-la-carte）以及第三方訂閱服務，全面轉向以訂閱制為核心的內容服務。
articles.title_zh: Amazon調整Luna定位，從遊戲平臺轉向訂閱服務
articles.summary_zh: Amazon近日宣布，旗下雲端遊戲服務Amazon Luna自2026年4月10日起，停止提供第三方遊戲商店、單獨購買遊戲（A-la-carte）以及第三方訂閱服務，全面轉向以訂閱制為核心的內容服務。

articles.title: CoreWeave與Anthropic簽署多年合作協議
articles.summary:
AI雲端基礎設施業者CoreWeave週四（4/10）宣布，已與AI公司Anthropic簽署多年合作協議，將支援其Claude系列模型的開發與部署。根據外電報導，這是Anthropic首度採用CoreWeave算力，顯示其正積極引進新的算力來源。
成立於2017年、以加密貨幣挖礦起家的CoreWeave，之後轉型為提供GPU為核心的AI雲端基礎設施，並吸引Nvidia入股，已於2025年登上美國那斯達克股市。
articles.title_zh: CoreWeave與Anthropic簽署多年合作協議
articles.summary_zh: AI雲端基礎設施業者CoreWeave宣布與AI公司Anthropic簽署多年合作協議，將支援其Claude系列模型的開發與部署。這是Anthropic首度採用CoreWeave算力，顯示其正積極引進新的算力來源。
